questionHtml: In an experiment, alpha particles of initial kinetic energy 5.9 MeV are directed at stationary nuclei of lead (Pb82207). Show that the distance of closest approach is about 4 × 10−14 m.
markschemeHtml:
2e AND 82e seen

OR

3.2 × 10−19 «C» AND 1.312 × 10−17 «C» seen ✓

d = 8.99×109×(2e)(82e)5.9×106×e = 3.998 × 10−14 ≈ 4 × 10−14 «m» ✓

Must see either clear substitutions or answer to at least 4 s.f. for MP2.
